## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Edward Chik for Account Strategist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Edward has extensive experience in technical account management, particularly at Fastly (6 years) and Akamai](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Demonstrated strong business acumen and customer retention skills, playing key roles in preventing churn of major accounts like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Actively involved in product development through Voice of Customer initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Recently completed journalism degree as self-designed AI curriculum, showing proactive approach to skill development](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Topics

### Professional Background

  - [Worked at Fastly for \~6 years as Technical Account Manager, joining as \~400th employee](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Previous roles at Akamai, NBC Universal, Rogers in similar customer-facing technical roles](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Brief stint as a product manager before joining Fastly](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

### Key Accomplishments at Fastly

  - [Prevented churn of major accounts multiple times, including Reddit and Bell Canada](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Led Voice of Customer program, playing crucial role in product development process](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Consistently worked 60-80 hour weeks, going above formal responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Approach to Customer Management

  - [Deeply understands client businesses and their strategic goals](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Proactively identifies upsell opportunities and aligns them with client needs](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Navigates complex negotiations involving multiple stakeholders (e.g. Reddit renewal)](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

### AI and Automation Usage

  - [Utilizes various LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot) for tasks like resume refinement](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Built an AI agent running locally in Docker](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [Learning MCP for potential future applications](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)

### Business Acumen

  - [Demonstrated understanding of SaaS metrics (NRR, churn prevention, profitability)](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Ability to balance customer retention with company profitability goals](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### Recent Education

  - [Completed journalism degree as a self-designed AI curriculum](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Focused on writing business case studies and improving linguistic skills for AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/qL3GgQf2BUK_n3qDXxwPoYdAdd-jyhzR?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX team (Andy and Tucker) to review interview feedback
  - Follow up with Edward regarding next steps in the hiring process
  - Consider Edward's AI/journalism background as potential unique value-add for the role
